---
name: Example request
about: Request a public repo example or architecture pattern.
title: "[Example]: "
labels: example

---

## Repository or architecture

Link the public repo or describe the architecture pattern.

## What should the example teach?

For example: framework, data platform, ML pipeline, microservice, embedded system,
agent system, API-only private architecture.

## Public sources

List public docs or source paths that should be used.

## Safety boundary

Mention anything that should not be inferred or published.
